metric_cards.tooltip: % of entries blocked by low-confidence gate

sections.empty_message: No regime data yet. Inferencer is still warming up.

_architecture.name: IslandPilot
_architecture.summary: Multi-island evolutionary pipeline that discovers market regimes, evolves per-regime execution configs via genetic algorithm, and applies them at runtime with adaptive position sizing.
_architecture.research_basis: Phase4 research: hierarchical GMM regime discovery + island-model GA
_architecture.training_description: Discovers market regimes from 5yr data, then evolves optimal execution configs per regime using genetic algorithm (~5-15 min).
training_steps: Select top features via mutual information
Evolve per-regime configs via island-model GA (100 generations)
Save trained models for runtime use

layers.name: FeaturePool
layers.description: Computes ~25 market features across volatility, trend, chop, momentum, and structure categories
layers.algorithm: Indicator-based feature extraction (NATR, ADX, EMA slopes, Hurst, RSI, etc.)

layers.name: RegimeTree
layers.description: Hierarchical GMM clustering — macro regimes split into sub-regimes
layers.algorithm: Gaussian Mixture Model with BIC model selection at both levels

config_keys.min_island_cycles: Min samples per island before merging (default: 200)

layers.name: IslandEvolver
layers.description: Per-regime genetic algorithm with sibling migration
layers.algorithm: Tournament selection, uniform crossover, Gaussian mutation, elitism
layers.output: Best execution config (genome) per regime island

layers.name: RegimeInferencer
layers.description: Runtime regime classification with sticky hysteresis to prevent whipsaw
layers.algorithm: Soft GMM probabilities + hard config switching with margin threshold

layers.name: AdaptiveSizer
layers.description: Multi-factor position sizing: confidence × drawdown × base, bounded by SafetySizing
layers.algorithm: Three multiplicative factors with hard caps

lifecycle.description: FeaturePool computes features → RegimeInferencer classifies regime → applies genome
Blocks if confidence < threshold or in grace period after regime switch
AdaptiveSizer scales position by confidence × drawdown factor
Injects evolved TP/hedge distances from active genome
Aborts cycle if danger exceeds evolved aggressiveness threshold
Records outcome for fitness tracking and potential online learning

composition_rules.gate_entry: AND — all pipelines must allow (any veto blocks)
composition_rules.suggest_exit: Most aggressive action wins (close_all > partial > tighten_sl > set_tp)
composition_rules.filter_order: Sequential chain — any None cancels the order
